title: Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple
tagline: Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Rakthakanda Swamy Temple, Omallur, Pathanamthitta District, known as "Omallur Temple" traces its history to the 8th century AD.
overview.description: Rakthakanda Swamy Temple, Omallur, Pathanamthitta District, known as "Omallur Temple" traces its history to the 8th century AD. It is a pilgrim centre on the way to Sabarimala from Pandalam, the birthplace of Sree Ayyappan. The Temple is famous for its annual festival of 10 days in the month of Medom of Malayalam Era. The 10-day festival is celebrated by 10 Karayogams (village communities) in and around Omallur. During the festival days, there is a customary Arattu procession to the river Achenkovil.

topPlaces.name: Omallur
topPlaces.description: Omallur is a small town in Kerala, about 3.5 km south of Pathanamthitta District headquarters. Omallur is famous for Vayal Vanibham, which is an annual farming fair held in the month of Meenam (October).

topPlaces.name: Kaipattoor Bridge
topPlaces.description: Kaipattoor Bridge is a concrete bridge in Pathanamthitta, Kerala that connects Kaipattoor and Omalloor over the Achankovil River.

topPlaces.name: Mathoor
topPlaces.description: Mathoor is a hamlet located near Omallur in the Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thrippara Shiva Kshetram
topPlaces.description: Thrippara Shiva Kshetram is a famous Shiva temple in Vallicode village, Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India. This temple is located on the banks of the Achankovil river.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkovil Sree Padmanabha Swami Kshetram
topPlaces.description: Thrikkovil Sree Padmanabhaswamy temple (Malayalam: തൃക്കോവില് ശ്രീ പദ്മനാഭ സ്വാമി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a Hindu temple with Lord Vishnu as the presiding deity, located at Vallicode village in Pathanamthitta District in Kerala, India. The temple is maintained by the Travancore Devaswom Board.

topPlaces.name: Vallicode
topPlaces.description: Vallicode (pronounced valli-koad) is a village in konni taluks Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. It is situated at about 7 km from the district headquarters of Pathanamthitta at south-east direction.

topPlaces.name: Kodumthara
topPlaces.description: Kodumthara is a village just outside Pathanamthitta City Suburbs, located in Kerala state, India. .

topPlaces.name: Vazhamuttom
topPlaces.description: Vazhamuttom is a village township near to Pathanamthitta Town in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India. River Achankovil split Vazhamuttom in to two parts West Vazhamuttom and East Vazhamuttom.

items.note: Omallur is a small town in Kerala, about 3.5 km south of Pathanamthitta District headquarters. Omallur is famous for Vayal Vanibham, which is an annual farming fair held in the month of Meenam (October).

Mathoor is a hamlet located near Omallur in the Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India.
Thrippara Shiva Kshetram is a famous Shiva temple in Vallicode village, Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India. This temple is located on the banks of the Achankovil river.

Thrikkovil Sree Padmanabhaswamy temple (Malayalam: തൃക്കോവില് ശ്രീ പദ്മനാഭ സ്വാമി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a Hindu temple with Lord Vishnu as the presiding deity, located at Vallicode village in Pathanamthitta District in Kerala, India. The temple is maintained by the Travancore Devaswom Board.

Vallicode (pronounced valli-koad) is a village in konni taluks Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. It is situated at about 7 km from the district headquarters of Pathanamthitta at south-east direction.
Kodumthara is a village just outside Pathanamthitta City Suburbs, located in Kerala state, India. .
Vazhamuttom is a village township near to Pathanamthitta Town in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, India. River Achankovil split Vazhamuttom in to two parts West Vazhamuttom and East Vazhamuttom.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (87 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rektha Kanda Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Omallur, Kaipattoor Bridge, Mathoor, Thrippara Shiva Kshetram, Thrikkovil Sree Padmanabha Swami Kshetram.
